source_name: Code4rena Wise Lending Findings & Analysis Report (2024-02)
finding_title: Borrowers can DoS liquidations by repaying as little as 1 share
summary: Wise Lending 的 liquidation 最大可还 shares 校验采用精确上限并在超过时 revert。借款人可先还 1 share 改变 maxShares，使 liquidator 使用原本有效的清算数量时超过新上限并 revert，形成清算 DoS。
root_cause: liquidation share-limit validation reverts on slightly stale repay amounts instead of clamping to the current maximum liquidatable shares
broken_invariants: a dust repayment must not make otherwise valid liquidation transactions revert indefinitely
liquidation max-share checks should tolerate small concurrent debt-share changes or clamp to live bounds
attack_preconditions: 借款人处于可清算状态且能在 liquidator 交易前执行极小 repay
liquidation function 要求 liquidator 传入 shares 且超过当前 maxShares 时 revert
attacker_capability: liquidable borrower able to repay dust debt shares before liquidation attempts

impact.description: borrower can delay or block liquidations, increasing bad-debt risk during price movement

why_not_higher: 主要是 liquidation availability / bad-debt risk，需市场价格继续恶化才扩大为直接损失。
why_not_lower: dust repay 可以反复阻断清算窗口，影响协议坏账控制。
common_false_positive_angles: 若 liquidation 输入是 amount 而非 shares 且内部按 live debt clamp，则不适用
若 repay 与 liquidation 原子排序无法被借款人利用，则影响降低
mitigations: 当 requested shares 超过当前 maxShares 时 clamp 到 maxShares，而不是直接 revert；或允许 liquidator 使用 close-factor percentage。
trigger_actions: cause liquidator supplied share amount to exceed recomputed maxShares and revert
